projects.title: MOVING OBJECT DETECTION USING ULTRASONIC SENSOR
projects.description: Utilized sensor data to measure distance and detect object presence. Implemented real-time object tracking and movement analysis. Applied for security and automation purposes.

projects.title: CLAP CONTROL HOME AUTOMATION
projects.description: Integrated sound sensors to detect clap signals for command execution. Automated devices like lights, fans, and appliances with a simple clap. Enhanced user convenience and accessibility in smart home setups.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Electrical Engineering
education.details: Bachelor of Technology in Electrical Engineering

education.institution: B.K.D Aldrich Public School Orai U.P.
